jsonLd.title: BlinkIt is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt family as a E-commerce Executive in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt:
BlinkIt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt!
